summary.shape_sentence: Opened strong, expanded up hard into morning high, then rotated lower and spent rest of RTH in broad balance-to-grind structure before modest late recovery.

goat.note: post-open vertical expansion into 10am high; clearest impulse leg

orange_banks_supply.note: capped local highs; afternoon tests stalled rather than broke cleanly

time_markers.10am_blue: MAJOR inflection — peak opening expansion, put in day HOD here; momentum shifted to retrace/rotation after
time_markers.12pm_red: near the low-making process; capitulation-to-stabilization zone
time_markers.2pm_green: afternoon re-expansion attempt; pushed higher into/just after but could not sustain breakout
time_markers.4pm_yellow: closed in upper half of afternoon range but not at extreme; constructive not impulsive

takeaway: Front-loaded bullish session — best opportunity was opening upside expansion, not later chop. Once 10am high failed, market shifted from trend to reversion then balance. Tactical reference: use for distinguishing A+ opening momentum from lower-quality afternoon rotations that follow completed morning move. After noon, the better trade is buying support and fading overstretched supply edges inside balance, NOT chasing breakout attempts.
